attributes: 1985 West Germany • Eva-Maria Reick Design • Ltd. Ed. #468/5000 • Vinyl & Cloth
condition_notes: New old stock – doll sealed in original display box with factory cellophane intact. Includes signed Certificate of Authenticity (No. 468 of 5000, dated 1985) and Kanekalon hair-care booklet. Box shows minor shelf wear.
